dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1006 IH: Removing the Director of the Congressional Budget Office.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mills submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on the Budget

form.official-title: Removing the Director of the Congressional Budget Office.

section.text: That effective immediately on the date of the adoption of this resolution, the Director of the Congressional Budget Office is hereby removed pursuant to section 201(a)(4) of the Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act of 1974 (2 U.S.C. 601(a)(4)).
